title: Vitess Topology
description: Schema for Vitess cluster topology entities including clusters, keyspaces, shards, tablets, VSchemas, and VReplication workflows used in managing horizontally-sharded MySQL clusters.

Cluster.title: Cluster
Cluster.description: A Vitess cluster registered with VTAdmin, representing a complete Vitess deployment with its own topology service, keyspaces, and tablets.

id.description: Unique identifier for the cluster used in API paths

name.description: Human-readable display name for the cluster

TabletAlias.title: TabletAlias
TabletAlias.description: A unique identifier for a VTTablet instance combining its cell and numeric UID.

cell.description: Cell (availability zone or data center) where the tablet is located

uid.description: Unique numeric identifier for the tablet within its cell

Tablet.title: Tablet
Tablet.description: A VTTablet instance managing a single MySQL instance within a Vitess shard. Tablets serve one of several roles: PRIMARY (read-write), REPLICA (read-only with replication), or RDONLY (read-only batch workloads).

hostname.description: Hostname of the machine running this tablet

port_map.description: Map of named ports to their port numbers (e.g., grpc: 16000, mysql: 3306)

keyspace.description: Name of the keyspace this tablet serves

shard.description: Key range shard this tablet serves (e.g., '-80', '80-', '-')

type.description: Role of this tablet in the cluster topology

mysql_hostname.description: MySQL hostname, which may differ from the tablet hostname when MySQL runs on a separate host

mysql_port.description: Port number on which MySQL is listening

tags.description: Arbitrary key-value tags for organizing and filtering tablets

Keyspace.title: Keyspace
Keyspace.description: A Vitess keyspace representing a logical database that may be sharded horizontally across multiple MySQL instances. Unsharded keyspaces contain a single shard serving the full key range.

name.description: Unique name of the keyspace within its cluster

sharding_column_name.description: Column name used as the sharding key. Empty for unsharded keyspaces.

sharding_column_type.description: Data type of the sharding column

served_froms.description: ServedFrom records for routing certain tablet types to a different keyspace

items.description: A ServedFrom record redirecting a tablet type to another keyspace

tablet_type.description: Tablet type that is served from another keyspace

keyspace.description: Keyspace to serve from for this tablet type

Shard.title: Shard
Shard.description: A shard within a Vitess keyspace representing a contiguous range of the sharding key space managed by a set of tablets.

keyspace.description: Name of the keyspace containing this shard

name.description: Key range name identifying this shard (e.g., '-80', '80-', '-')

primary_alias.description: Tablet alias of the current primary (read-write) tablet for this shard

primary_term_start_time.description: Timestamp when the current primary was elected

is_primary_serving.description: Whether the primary tablet is currently serving queries

source_shards.description: Source shards from which this shard is being populated during a reshard

uid.description: Unique ID for this source shard reference

VSchema.title: VSchema
VSchema.description: VTGate routing schema defining how queries are routed to shards. Specifies vindexes (sharding functions) and table routing rules for a keyspace.

sharded.description: Whether this keyspace is sharded. Unsharded keyspaces have a simpler VSchema.

vindexes.description: Map of vindex names to their definitions. Vindexes are sharding functions that map column values to shards.

tables.description: Map of table names to their VSchema table definitions specifying routing behavior

Vindex.title: Vindex
Vindex.description: A vindex (virtual index) defining how column values are mapped to shards. Vindexes enable Vitess to route queries to the correct shard without a scatter query.

type.description: Vindex type determining the hashing algorithm

params.description: Additional parameters for the vindex type

owner.description: Table that owns this vindex (for lookup vindexes)

VSchemaTable.title: VSchemaTable
VSchemaTable.description: VSchema definition for a table specifying which vindexes are used for routing queries to this table.

column_vindexes.description: List of column-to-vindex mappings for this table

items.description: A mapping from a column to a vindex

column.description: Column name used as input to the vindex

name.description: Name of the vindex to use for this column

auto_increment.description: Auto-increment configuration using a Vitess sequence

sequence.description: Sequence table to use for generating IDs

columns.description: Column definitions for type-aware query routing

Workflow.title: Workflow
Workflow.description: A VReplication workflow orchestrating data movement between keyspaces or shards. Workflow types include MoveTables, Reshard, Materialize, and CreateLookupVindex.

name.description: Unique name for the workflow within its target keyspace

source.description: Source configuration specifying where data is being read from

target.description: Target configuration specifying where data is being written to

max_v_replication_lag.description: Maximum replication lag in seconds across all VReplication streams in this workflow

workflow_sub_type.description: Sub-type providing additional context for the workflow type

Backup.title: Backup
Backup.description: A tablet backup record representing a point-in-time snapshot of a shard's MySQL data.

cluster_id.description: ID of the cluster that owns this backup

tablet_alias.description: Alias of the tablet that created this backup

time.description: Timestamp when the backup was taken

engine.description: Backup engine used to create this backup

name.description: Unique name for this backup within its storage location
